content: We can reframe Self-Refine’s iterative self-improvement pipeline as a primitive single-perspective self-reflection mechanism, and can upgrade it by integrating multiple inconsistent solving perspectives from advanced LLM self-reflection research to eliminate the blind spots of single-perspective self-feedback. This creates a multi-perspective Self-Refine framework that retains the original method’s key advantage of requiring no extra supervised training or reinforcement learning while boosting output quality further.
